title: Comparing Prices 比价
scene: 两个同学在商店里比较两件商品的价格。

lines.en: Ryan, look at these two backpacks. Which one do you think is better?
lines.zh: 瑞安，看这两个书包。你觉得哪个更好？

lines.en: The blue one looks nice. How much is it?
lines.zh: 蓝色的看起来不错。多少钱？

lines.en: It's one hundred and fifty yuan. The red one is only eighty yuan.
lines.zh: 一百五十元。红色的只要八十元。

lines.en: That's a big difference! Why is the blue one so expensive?
lines.zh: 差好多！为什么蓝色的那么贵？

lines.en: It says it's waterproof and has more pockets.
lines.zh: 上面说它是防水的，而且口袋更多。

lines.en: That's useful! Does the red one have those features?
lines.zh: 很实用！红色的有这些功能吗？

lines.en: No, it doesn't. But I don't really need a waterproof bag.
lines.zh: 没有。但我不太需要防水的包。

lines.en: Then the red one is a better deal for you!
lines.zh: 那红色的对你来说更划算！

lines.en: You're right! I'll go with the red one and save some money.
lines.zh: 你说得对！我选红色的，还能省些钱。

lines.en: Smart choice! You can use the money you saved to buy some stickers.
lines.zh: 明智的选择！省下的钱可以买些贴纸。
